properties.sql: SELECT COALESCE(env.id, bp.envelope_code) AS id, 'view →' AS view_link, bp.envelope_code, env.c_programme_code AS programme_code, COALESCE(reg.c_name, env.c_programme_code) AS programme_name, env.c_currency AS currency, to_char(bp.allocated, 'FM999,999,999.00') AS allocated_disp, to_char(bp.available, 'FM999,999,999.00') AS available_disp, to_char(bp.reserved, 'FM999,999,999.00') AS reserved_disp, to_char(bp.pre_committed, 'FM999,999,999.00') AS pre_committed_disp, to_char(bp.committed, 'FM999,999,999.00') AS committed_disp, ROUND(((bp.reserved + bp.pre_committed + bp.committed + bp.expensed) * 100.0) / NULLIF(bp.allocated, 0), 1) || '%' AS utilisation_pct, bp.last_event_at, bp.event_count, COALESCE(inv.invariant_status, '—') AS invariant_status, COALESCE((SELECT count(*)::text FROM app_fd_subsidy_app_2025 a WHERE a.c_applied_programme = env.c_programme_code AND a.c_status IN ('auto_approved','approved')), '0') AS beneficiary_count, COALESCE((SELECT to_char(CAST(d.c_targetvalue AS NUMERIC(15,2)), 'FM999,999,999.00') FROM app_fd_mm_determinant d WHERE d.c_code = 'BENEFIT_AMOUNT_' || env.c_programme_code), '—') AS benefit_amount_disp, COALESCE((SELECT to_char(count(a.id) * CAST(d.c_targetvalue AS NUMERIC(15,2)), 'FM999,999,999.00') FROM app_fd_subsidy_app_2025 a, app_fd_mm_determinant d WHERE a.c_applied_programme = env.c_programme_code AND a.c_status IN ('auto_approved','approved') AND d.c_code = 'BENEFIT_AMOUNT_' || env.c_programme_code GROUP BY d.c_targetvalue), '—') AS total_disbursed_disp, COALESCE((SELECT string_agg(district || ' (' || cnt::text || ')', ', ' ORDER BY cnt DESC) FROM (SELECT COALESCE(NULLIF(a.c_district, ''), '—') AS district, count(*) AS cnt FROM app_fd_subsidy_app_2025 a WHERE a.c_applied_programme = env.c_programme_code AND a.c_status IN ('auto_approved','approved') GROUP BY a.c_district ORDER BY count(*) DESC LIMIT 5) s), '—') AS top_districts, CASE WHEN inv.invariant_status = 'VIOLATION' THEN 'imbalanced' WHEN ROUND(((bp.reserved + bp.pre_committed + bp.committed + bp.expensed) * 100.0) / NULLIF(bp.allocated, 0), 1) > 100 THEN 'overspent' WHEN ROUND(((bp.reserved + bp.pre_committed + bp.committed + bp.expensed) * 100.0) / NULLIF(bp.allocated, 0), 1) >= 80 THEN 'watch' WHEN bp.last_event_at IS NULL OR bp.last_event_at < now() - INTERVAL '60 days' THEN 'dormant' ELSE 'healthy' END AS alert_status_html, COALESCE((SELECT string_agg(CASE WHEN cnt > 0 THEN '' ELSE '' END, '' ORDER BY day) FROM (SELECT to_char(d::date, 'YYYY-MM-DD') AS day, COALESCE((SELECT count(*) FROM app_fd_budget_event ev WHERE ev.c_envelope_code = bp.envelope_code AND date_trunc('day', ev.datecreated) = d), 0) AS cnt FROM generate_series(now()::date - INTERVAL '59 days', now()::date, INTERVAL '1 day') d) days), '') AS sparkline_html FROM budget_projection bp LEFT JOIN app_fd_budget_envelope env ON env.c_code = bp.envelope_code LEFT JOIN app_fd_mm_registration reg ON reg.c_code = env.c_programme_code LEFT JOIN budget_invariants inv ON inv.envelope_code = bp.envelope_code ORDER BY env.c_programme_code NULLS LAST, bp.envelope_code
